article_meta.title: President Donald Trump dismissed sex offender Jeffrey Epstein as “disgusting” and decried his procurer, Ghislaine Maxwel

reasoning: Caught some genuine author-prose bias but included quoted language as bias, used non-standard labels, and missed additional clear instances.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: Flagged quoted language in the headline/body (Trump calling Epstein 'disgusting' and Maxwell 'evil').

custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed biased author word choices like 'procurer' and sensational RELATED link headline styling.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Labels like 'Positive Framing,' 'Loaded Language,' 'Selective Emphasis,' 'Omission,' and 'Editorial Characterization' are outside the allowed set.
